# Rigid Body Dynamics

**Website:** https://rigidbodydynamics.com/
**Description:** Rigid Body Dynamics provides AI agents designed to automate supply chain and back-office operations for Indian FMCG brand owners, manufacturers, and distributors. 

## Core Value Proposition
The platform turns unstructured communication channels (WhatsApp, Email, Excel, Phone voice notes) into fully automated, structured operations. 
* **Zero Migration:** Plugs directly into existing workflows with no new tools, retraining, or IT projects required.
* **Impact:** Delivers 99.99% accuracy, an 80% reduction in admin time, and a 4-week deployment cycle.
* **Goal:** Enables traditional businesses to double their order volume and scale operations without increasing back-office headcount.

## The Multi-Agent Architecture
The system operates as a unified, 24/7 digital operations team where specialized AI agents coordinate autonomously:

* **Procurement Agent:** Detects low stock, scores vendors, and automatically generates purchase orders.
* **Production Planner:** Adjusts manufacturing line schedules in real-time based on actual demand signals (MRP, line rebalancing).
* **Dispatch Coordinator:** Optimizes routes, plans truck loads, and alerts warehouse teams via WhatsApp.
* **Field Listener:** Processes WhatsApp messages, voice notes, and photos (including mixed Hindi-English and OCR) from the sales team into structured data.
* **Credit Watchdog:** Monitors distributor credit limits, enforces territory pricing, and places automatic holds on accounts exceeding limits.
* **Forecast Engine:** Analyzes regional demand patterns from inbound orders to feed predictive data to procurement and production.

## Key Capabilities & Workflows
* **Unified Visibility:** Real-time metrics across procurement, production, warehousing, and distribution on a single screen.
* **Disruption Radar:** Automatically flags delays, stockouts, or route exceptions and executes rapid recovery actions.
* **Order Processing:** Instantly matches mixed-language voice/text orders to SKUs, checks live inventory, and confirms orders back via chat.

## Target Audience
Indian Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) sector, specifically:
* Brand Owners
* Manufacturers
* Distributors
